Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Nothin' weird about two guys goin' to the movies together, right? 'Cause this superhero flick's got me pumped![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 3 7}C'mon, let's go! Ooh, I'm grabbin' some caramel corn![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Just picked up a robbery in progress on the police scanner! It's at a bank five blocks away, big guy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}The cops in this town are a joke. We'd better get moving, stat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}And, uh, this one of those banks where tons of hot babes hang out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watched American heroes save[n]innocent lives from evil forces.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned how to stand up[n]for freedom and justice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Man... I should've been born in America.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}By now, I would've like, saved so many chicks![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 9 25 25}{f 4 21 3 7}Maybe even the whole freakin' country! And everyone'd be like, "Wow, you're the best, Junpei-Man!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Coulda been a whole different life, man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went back to the dorm with Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}
